useCases.name: LOS Customer Creation
preConditions: Receipt of filled in Loan Application & required documents from the Customer
postConditions: Customer ID created & Bank Officer can capture the loan details as requested by the customer in the LOS

workflow.action: Walks into the Bank Branch or interacts with the Bank officer & enquires about the process for obtaining the loan from the Bank
Enquires the purpose of the Loan, Financial details of the customer & briefs the customer about the loan product features & the required documents
Submits the filled in Loan application form along with the required documents
Verifies the documents submitted by the customer with the check list & if any discrepancy requests the customer for providing the details in the application or submission of the valid documents
Once convinced with the application form & documents issues an acknowledgement to the customer & initiates the Customer Creation Process
Captures the customer details such as Personal Details, Communication Details, and Employment & Income details in LOS for Customer ID Creation
Saves the record for Customer ID creation
Creates Customer ID
Can capture the loan details requested by the customer in LOS to proceed further

useCases.name: Linking of Co-Applicant/Co-Obligant/Guarantor
preConditions: Customer ID and Linking of Customer ID to Loan Product has already been done.
All the concerned documents pertaining to the proposed loan account are submitted by the customer.
postConditions: Updation of particulars regarding the Co-applicant / Co-obligant / Guarantor for the proposed loan.
Creation of the Customer ID’s for Co-applicant / Co-obligant / Guarantor is created.

workflow.action: Submits the filled loan application form along with the required documents
Verifies the documents submitted by the customer with the checklist and requests for valid documents if discrepancies are found
Issues acknowledgement to the customer and initiates the Customer Creation Process after verification
Captures customer personal, communication, employment, and income details and links them in LOS for Customer ID creation
Links the Customer ID to the proposed loan product and related asset details
Creates Customer IDs for Co-applicant(s), Co-obligant(s), and Guarantor(s) capturing detailed personal, communication, employment, income and expenses information
Captures assets and liabilities position of the Co-applicant, Co-obligant, or Guarantor to determine net worth
Saves the record for creation of Customer IDs for Co-applicant, Co-obligant, and Guarantor
Initiates linking of Co-applicant, Co-obligant, or Guarantor details with the applicant loan application
Selects or enters applicant type, customer ID, name, relationship, income inclusion, and remarks to link co-parties to the loan application
Saves the record and adds the Co-applicant, Co-obligant, or Guarantor details to the loan application
Proceeds to capture further loan details requested by the customer in LOS
Fetches details from existing customer IDs from CBS if Co-applicant, Co-obligant, or Guarantor are existing bank customers

useCases.name: Linking of Customer ID to Loan Product
preConditions: Customer ID has already been created
All concerned documents pertaining to the proposed loan account are submitted by the customer
postConditions: The Customer ID is linked to a particular Loan account
Updation of particulars of the proposed Asset pertaining to the proposed loan

workflow.action: Initiates process to link Customer ID to a particular loan product
Checks the loan application details for purpose of the loan requested by the customer
Selects the loan product to be linked to the Customer ID in LOS

Enters loan details in LOS including Loan Amount, Project Cost, Interest Type, Interest Rate, Initial Holiday Period, Loan Period, Installment Periodicity, Margin % required, Margin offered, and Purpose of Loan
Provides a brief description taking into account Income & Expenditure, Repayment Capacity and other parameters
Saves the record to complete linking of Customer ID with the Loan Product

useCases.name: Loan Appraisal Workflow
preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to the loan Account
All the Customer details captured in the LOS such as Proposed Asset details, Asset & Liabilities Details, Proposed Loan Limit arrived
Particulars of the Co-applicant/Guarantor/Co-Obligant captured
postConditions: Bank Officer can proceed further with the Risk Analysis

workflow.action: Initiates the appraisal process after Customer ID is created and all customer details are captured in LOS
Requests and obtains Legal Scrutiny Report (LSR) from the Bank's advocate
Requests and obtains Security Valuation Report from the Bank appointed Engineers
Obtains Verification report for customer's personal and employment details from external/internal agencies
Obtains Income Verification Report from Employer/IT department
Obtains Credit Information Report from customer's existing Bankers and Credit Information Bureau
Captures all obtained report details into the Appraisal process in LOS
Saves the record to generate Appraisal Note/Process Note

useCases.name: Work Flow for Loan Assessment
useCases.preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to the loan account; all customer details captured in LOS including proposed asset details, asset & liabilities details, proposed loan limit, particulars of co-applicant/guarantor/co-obligant; appraisal note/process note generated; risk analysis completed.
useCases.postConditions: Assessment process of proposed loan is completed; Bank Officer proceeds with terms and conditions to be specified.

workflow.action: Initiates the loan assessment process to arrive at the maximum loan amount.
Ensures that customer and loan details are completed and captured in LOS.
Calculates the maximum loan amount based on project cost, margin, and product caps.

Prepares assessment sheet with fields: loan amount requested, present income, present security value, rate of interest, loan tenure, future service period, repayment capacity, and assessed loan amount.
Verifies assessment details and adds remarks for any changes to assessment amount.
Completes assessment process and proceeds with terms and conditions specification.

useCases.name: Work Flow for Recommendations
useCases.preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to loan account, all customer details captured in LOS including Proposed Asset details, Asset & Liabilities Details, Proposed Loan Limit, particulars of Co-applicant/Guarantor/Co-Obligant, Appraisal note/Process note generated, Risk Analysis completed, Proposed Loan Amount assessed and Terms & conditions finalized.
useCases.postConditions: Recommendations added and the Appraisal/Process note forwarded to the Sanctioning authorities for approval.

workflow.action: Initiates the process for adding recommendations to the Proposed Loan.
Updates recommendations such as Loan Amount, Rate of Interest, Loan Tenure, and Proposed repayment.
Provides justification for recommended changes in the Loan Proposal.
Captures the changes proposed and recommended in LOS.
Saves the updated recommendations.
Forwards the Appraisal note/Process note to the approving/Sanctioning authorities.

useCases.name: Work Flow for Risk Analysis
useCases.preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to the loan Account & all the Customer details captured in the LOS such as Proposed Asset details, Asset & Liabilities Details, Proposed Loan Limit arrived, particulars of the Co-applicant/ Guarantor/ Co-Obligant & Appraisal note/ Process note generated.
useCases.postConditions: Risk Analysis is completed & the Bank Officer proceeds further for Assessment of the Loan.

workflow.action: Initiates the Risk rating process once Customer ID is created and linked to the loan Account and customer details are captured in LOS.
Obtains and verifies reports such as Legal Scrutiny report, Technical Report, Financial Verification report, and Employment/ Personal Verification report from various departments/agencies.
Verifies the Loan Application form for Customer's Financial Details, Employment details, Personal Details, Security details.

Evaluates Customer's risk rating by considering parameters like Personal Data, Age, Education, Occupation, Number of dependents, Length of service in present job/current business, Existing relationship with the Bank, Other business support, Period of stay in current address, Type of ownership of residence, Ownership of vehicles, Income/Net worth, Loan Details, Security coverage, Guarantors Net worth, and Type of loan.
Assigns weightages to the risk evaluation parameters to determine the Risk Rating score of the Customer.
Categorizes Customer based on Risk Rating score and captures the rating into the LOS.

useCases.name: Work Flow for Sanction Letter Generation & Customers Response
preConditions: Loan Proposal has already been Approved/ Rejected by the Sanctioning Authorities
postConditions: Loan Offer Accepted by the customer
Bank Officer initiates the process for Opening Loan Account in CBS

workflow.action: Generates the Sanction or Rejection letter to communicate the Loan status to the customer

Includes loan details such as name, co-applicant, address, type, status, amount, interest rate, tenure, EMI, repayment schedule, holiday period, guarantor details, terms & conditions, time clause, and remarks in the letter
Forwards the Sanction or Rejection letter to the customer to communicate the loan status and obtain acceptance
Receives the Sanction or Rejection letter
Acknowledges the offer and returns the acceptance to the Bank Officer or intimates rejection
Updates the customer's response in the Loan Origination System
Initiates the process for opening Loan Account in CBS based on customer's acceptance

useCases.name: Work Flow for Sanction of Loan
preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to the loan Account
All Customer details captured in the LOS including Proposed Asset details, Asset & Liabilities Details, Proposed Loan Limit
Particulars of Co-applicant/Guarantor/Co-Obligant captured
Appraisal note / Process note generated
Risk Analysis completed
Proposed Loan Amount assessed
Terms & conditions finalized
Recommendations updated & forwarded to sanctioning authorities for review
postConditions: Sanctioning Authority updates the sanction or rejection of Proposed Loan in LOS
Bank Officer communicates the sanction or rejection to the customer

workflow.action: Reviews the Appraisal Note / Process note for approval of Loan
Comments on discrepancies and insists on additional information or reports if any discrepancy in the recommended proposal
Retransmits the proposal back to Bank Officer for clearance of discrepancies
Views comments given by Sanctioning Authority and requests additional information/report from customer/agency/department
Obtains additional information/report and updates Appraisal note / Process note in LOS and forwards it to Sanctioning Authority
Reviews modified Appraisal / Process note and either approves/sanctions the loan with additional conditions if any or rejects the loan proposal
Updates the sanction or rejection decision in LOS and forwards it to Bank Officer
Communicates the sanction or rejection decision to the customer

useCases.name: Work Flow for Terms & Conditions
preConditions: Customer ID created and linked to the loan Account
All Customer details captured in LOS including Proposed Asset details, Asset & Liabilities Details
Proposed Loan Limit arrived
Particulars of the Co-applicant/ Guarantor/ Co–Obligant captured
Appraisal note/ Process note generated
Risk Analysis completed
Proposed Loan Amount assessed
postConditions: Process for finalization of Terms & Conditions completed
Bank Officer proceeds further for recommendation

workflow.action: Initiates the process for adding Terms & Conditions for the Proposed Loan
Displays the Terms & Conditions which are specific and generic to the product
Views the generic Terms & Conditions and modifies or deletes them in LOS
Adds the required additional Terms & Conditions to the Appraisal note or Process note in LOS, if any
Finalizes and saves the Terms & Conditions record and proceeds further for recommendation

useCases.name: Workflow for Capturing Proposed Asset Details
preConditions: Customer ID has already been created
Customer ID linked to the Loan Product
postConditions: Proposed Asset details captured in LOS
The Bank Officer can check the proposed limit

workflow.action: Initiates capturing of Proposed Asset details in LOS after Customer ID is linked to Loan Product
Checks application form for Purpose of the loan and Proposed Asset details

Captures Proposed Asset details in LOS such as Loan Type, Type of Asset, Purpose of Loan, Asset Cost, Total Purchase price, Incidental Cost, Other Cost, Market Value, Loan Outstanding, Address, Area of land, Built up area, and Stage of construction
Saves the Proposed Asset details record and proceeds to check the proposed limit/loan

useCases.name: Workflow for checking the eligibility of the customer & proposed loan limit
preConditions: Customer ID has already been created linked to the Loan product
Proposed asset details captured
postConditions: Loan Limit checked & captured in LOS
Bank Officer can proceed further for capturing the Asset & Liabilities details of the customer

workflow.action: Initiates the process for checking the Loan limit after Proposed Asset details are captured into the LOS
Checks the application form for Income, Expenditure, Asset details, Loan Amount, and tenure

Enters customer details in the Loan calculator including Loan Type, Date of Birth, Purpose of Loan, Asset Details, Cost of Asset, Loan Amount, Loan Tenure, Occupation, Company Details, Total Work experience, Age of retirement, Monthly Income, Other Income, Total EMI for existing liabilities, and Co-Applicant details
Submits the record to determine eligibility of customer and proposed Loan Limit
Captures the proposed Loan limit into the LOS

useCases.name: Workflow for Evaluating the Net Worth of the Parties
preConditions: Customer ID’s has already been created for all the parties and linked to the proposed Loan.
postConditions: Loan Limit checked & captured in LOS.
The Bank Officer can proceed further for the Appraisal of the proposed loan.

workflow.action: Checks the primary eligibility of the customer in LOS after the proposed asset details are captured
Creates Customer IDs for Co-applicant, Co-obligant, and Guarantor and links them to the proposed loan
Initiates the process to evaluate assets and liabilities for calculating net worth of all parties
Enters asset details including savings, immovable properties, bank deposits, investments, and LIC policy info in LOS
Enters liabilities details including borrowings from banks/others, employer liabilities, and other liabilities in LOS
Evaluates assets and liabilities of all parties and captures data in LOS to arrive at net worth (Assets minus Liabilities)
